title: asplenium ruta-muraria var. leptophyllum
intro: Asplenium ruta-muraria var. leptophyllum, also known as the wall-rue or wall fern, is a rare and endangered species of plant in the asplenium genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be dried and used in herbal capsules or tinctures.
